4:79.arabic: مَا أَصَابَكَ مِنْ حَسَنَةٍ فَمِنَ اللَّهِ وَمَا أَصَابَكَ مِن سَيِّئَةٍ فَمِن نَّفْسِكَ وَأَرْسَلْنَاكَ لِلنَّاسِ رَسُولًا وَكَفَىٰ بِاللَّهِ شَهِيدًا
4:79.english: Whatever good reaches you is from Allah; whatever ill befalls you is from yourself. And We have sent you to mankind as a messenger. And Allah is sufficient as Witness.
4:79.score_notes: Famous short phrase. كَفَىٰ بِاللَّهِ شَهِيدًا appears 4x in the Quran — ideal for teaching shahid in isolation.

lesson_use.notes: Ultra-short (3 words). The phrase recurs 4x in the Quran — near-refrain. Teaches shahid in pure isolation before the longer 5:117.

4:69.arabic: وَمَن يُطِعِ اللَّهَ وَالرَّسُولَ فَأُولَٰئِكَ مَعَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ النَّبِيِّينَ وَالصِّدِّيقِينَ وَالشُّهَدَاءِ وَالصَّالِحِينَ وَحَسُنَ أُولَٰئِكَ رَفِيقًا
4:69.english: Whoever obeys Allah and the Messenger — those will be with the ones whom Allah has blessed: the prophets, the truthful, the witnesses, and the righteous. And excellent are those as companions.
4:69.score_notes: The four ranks — prophets, truthful, witnesses, righteous. Famous and widely known. Teacher moved from pipeline to practice.

lesson_use.arabic: مَعَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ النَّبِيِّينَ وَالصِّدِّيقِينَ وَالشُّهَدَاءِ وَالصَّالِحِينَ
lesson_use.english: With those Allah has blessed — the prophets, the truthful, the witnesses, and the righteous
lesson_use.notes: The four ranks. Teaches shuhadaa (plural) in a famous context. Teacher moved from pipeline — too well-known to defer.
